title: Peaceful Countryside Camping in Biggin
intro: The campsite is right next to the pub, so you're never far from a decent meal and a cold pint.
Whether you're here for the walking, the cycling or just to get away from it all, we've got you sorted.
Head out for the day, come back to your pitch and watch the sun drop behind the hills. Then nip in for a well-earned pint.

cards.title: Walking & Cycling
items: Direct access to Peak District routes
Stunning walks straight from your pitch
Perfect base for exploring the Peaks

cards.title: On Your Doorstep
items: Large beer garden with panoramic views
Cosy pub interior for rainy days
